intro: Pope Leo has called for stricter AI regulation and public ownership of AI data, warning that some autonomous weapons systems have moved beyond human control. Meanwhile, fiber-optic infrastructure has emerged as the critical bottleneck for scaling AI data centers, with dense fiber networks becoming essential to computational capacity. Tech companies and Western diplomats have been lobbying the Vatican ahead of the Pope's first encyclical on artificial intelligence.
